name: Identify inactive customers in last 90 days
description: Xác định danh sách khách hàng không phát sinh giao dịch trong 90 ngày gần nhất để phục vụ chiến dịch chăm sóc khách hàng.

steps.name: LOAD_CUSTOMER
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    customer_name,
    customer_email,
    customer_phone
FROM ${CUSTOMER_TABLE}
WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Load customer master data with required columns, filtering out null customer_id.

steps.name: LOAD_TRANSACTION
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    transaction_date
FROM ${TRANSACTION_TABLE}
WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_SUB(${REFERENCE_DATE}, 90)
  AND transaction_date <= ${REFERENCE_DATE}
  AND customer_id IS NOT NULL
  AND transaction_date IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Load transactions from the last 90 days based on a reference date, with null filtering on key columns.

steps.name: DEDUP_TRANSACTION
steps.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT customer_id
FROM LOAD_TRANSACTION
WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Deduplicate transaction customer IDs to get a unique list of customers with activity in the last 90 days.

steps.name: JOIN_FIND_INACTIVE
steps.sql:
SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(DEDUP_TRANSACTION) */
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_name,
    c.customer_email,
    c.customer_phone
FROM LOAD_CUSTOMER c
LEFT ANTI JOIN DEDUP_TRANSACTION d
    ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
steps.description: Perform an anti-join to identify customers without any transaction in the last 90 days, with a broadcast hint on the small deduplicated transaction set.

steps.name: SAVE_INACTIVE_CUSTOMERS
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    customer_name,
    customer_email,
    customer_phone
FROM JOIN_FIND_INACTIVE
steps.description: Write the final list of inactive customers to the output table.
